Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: How-to man-up a Jeep Wrangler by plucking out the anemic 3.8L V6 and replacing it with a late model Hemi V8.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Image.alt: Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap
Hemi JK: V6 to V8 Swap

Video.summary: Tech details on completing a Jeep Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: Hemi JK: V8 Swap Completion

Video.summary: How-to lift our Hemi Jeep with mid-arm suspension and a Dana 44 front diff for more articulation and grip.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Mid-Arm Articulation

Video.summary: We complete our V8 Hemi Wrangler project making it trail ready.
Video.title: Hemi JK: Rock Ready

Video.summary: Hemi Jeep gets Dana 44s with air lockers then a payoff in the rough with off-road suspension designer Rusty Me
Video.title: Hemi JK: Payoff

Video.summary: We kick off a new Ford F150 build!
Video.title: A Ford F150 Dream Build

Video.summary: EBC Brakes giveaway 2020 F150 gets body mods and upgrades for a sporty dream truck appearance.
Video.title: Ford F150 Dream Truck Part 2

Video.summary: EBC Brakes giveaway 2020 F150 wraps up with more upgrades and a trip to the Grand Ole Opry.
Video.title: Ford F150 Dream Truck Part 3

Video.summary: We revisit the F150 Dream Truck and find out what bolt on upgrades actually do to your horsepower.
Video.title: F150 Dream Truck Reloaded

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber
Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle Payoff

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.
Video.title: The Highwayman - Odds & Ends

Video.summary: Old school sheet metal tricks to convert classic '49 Ford into a custom with suicide doors.
Video.title: Project Banana Split - Deadly Doors

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: Tommy picks up a wounded pony, and Rick shows best ways to lay down paint, this week on MuscleCar.
Video.title: Fox Body Pony - Part 1

Video.summary: Dark Horse gets a stroker motor, and Rick shows how to set up your paint gun and spray candy paint.
Video.title: Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course

Image.alt: Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course
Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course
Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course

Video.summary: Dark Horse gets a top end and exhaust, plus Rick shows the difference between cast and forged wheels.
Video.title: Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust

Image.alt: Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust
Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust
Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust

Video.summary: Dark Horse loses its interior, but gains a roll cage.
Video.title: Dark Horse Interior Tear-Away

Video.summary: Dark Horse takes a trip to the paint booth, and Flashback features a rare AMC Pony Car.
Video.title: Dark Horse Paint & Body

Video.summary: Dark Horse is buttoned up, then heads to the track, but then the guys have an issue!
Video.title: Dark Horse Stage 1 Complete!

Video.summary: We upgrade our F-250 with a gooseneck hitch, airlift suspension, and enhanced brakes for heavy hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Video.summary: Our Ford F-250 gets a few more features added to help performance and function while hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
